openings.name: London System
openings.description: The bot plays the London System against you. Learn to meet the d4–Bf4 setup.

openings.name: Caro-Kann Defence
openings.description: Practice the Caro-Kann from either side: Advance, Classical and Exchange lines.

openings.name: Wayward Queen Attack
openings.description: The bot goes for 2.Qh5 and Scholar’s Mate tricks. Learn to punish the early queen.

openings.name: Fried Liver Attack
openings.description: The bot plays the Italian with Ng5, hunting f7. Defend the Two Knights correctly.
